candidate.objective: Experienced Project Supervisor and skilled Polywelder with over 15 years in the mining and construction industry. Proven expertise in detailed and bulk earthworks, HDPE pipeline fabrication and welding, dewatering, and all-round plant operation. Holds Schedule 26 Statutory Supervisor certification, Certificate IV in Civil Construction Supervision, and Certificate III in Polymer Processing. Demonstrated ability to build, lead, and manage multi-discipline work groups across multiple work fronts, liaising effectively with clients and ensuring adherence to project specifications, quality assurance, and HSE requirements. FMG inducted as Isolation Officer, Permit Holder and Permit Issuer.

duties: Supervised HDPE pipeline installation, fabrication, and dewatering projects for mining and civil clients.
Managed multi-discipline work crews across multiple simultaneous work fronts.
Ensured adherence to client and project specifications, quality standards, and HSE requirements.
Liaised with clients and project management to track progress and meet milestone dates.
Applied Schedule 26 statutory supervisor responsibilities on WA mine sites.
Maintained FMG Isolation Officer, Permit Holder, and Permit Issuer status throughout project works.
Supervised polyethylene pipeline installation and dewatering operations across mining infrastructure projects.
Led and managed work groups in the planning and execution of project works.
Enforced quality assurance and HSE compliance in challenging field environments.
Coordinated with project management and clients to ensure works aligned with scheduling and specification requirements.
Operated and maintained dewatering systems on mining and civil construction sites.
Monitored pump performance, troubleshot faults, and carried out maintenance to ensure continuous dewatering operations.
Worked within confined space and permit-to-work environments.
Led HDPE pipeline crews on underground services installation projects.
Performed butt fusion, electrofusion, and extrusion welding on polyethylene pipelines.
Supervised crew members and maintained quality and safety standards throughout project works.
Performed butt fusion, electrofusion, and extrusion welding of polyethylene pipelines on site.
Maintained equipment and ensured all welds met project quality specifications.
Worked safely within mining site environments under permit-to-work procedures.
Fabricated HDPE pipeline components and assemblies in a workshop environment.
Performed extrusion and butt fusion welding to project specifications.
Maintained a clean and safe workshop environment.
Performed on-site polyethylene pipeline welding using butt fusion and electrofusion methods.
Worked within mining site environments, adhering to site safety and quality standards.
Fabricated polyethylene components and assemblies in a production workshop setting.
Developed foundational skills in HDPE welding, extrusion techniques, and pipeline fabrication.
Maintained quality control over fabricated items prior to site delivery.

skills.detail: Advanced skills in butt fusion (PMBWELD301E), electrofusion (PMBWELD302E), and extrusion welding (PMBWELD309) of polyethylene pipelines. Over 15 years of hands-on welding experience in workshop and site environments.

Holds Schedule 26 Statutory Supervisor certification and Certificate IV in Civil Construction Supervision. Experienced leading multi-trade work groups across simultaneous work fronts in mining and civil construction.
Extensive experience operating and maintaining dewatering systems across mining and civil projects. Experienced as a Dewatering Technician with Thiess and in supervisory dewatering roles.
Experienced operating IT Loaders, Skid Steer, Excavators, and Forklifts across various mining and civil construction projects.

FMG inducted as Isolation Officer, Permit Holder, and Permit Issuer. Holds confined space entry, gas test atmospheres, and permit-to-work competencies. Strong commitment to HSE leadership and compliance.
Strong focus on quality assurance throughout project lifecycle, from weld preparation and inspection through to final project delivery. Adherence to client specifications and aesthetic requirements.
